name: [ HP ] Weasley Family
description:
DOESN'T HAVE BILL OR CHARLIE. The Weasley family is a prominent wizarding family in the Harry Potter series. Known for their fiery red hair, kindness, and their close-knit bond, the Weasleys are characterized by their love of practical jokes, their involvement in the fight against Voldemort, and their welcoming home, The Burrow.
｡･ﾟ♡ﾟ･｡🪻｡･ﾟ♡ﾟ･｡🌻
I lied, one more before my LoZ switch. Two things; This is my first attempt with multiple characters in one bot, and the bot is only limitless for violence such as if a roleplay involves the wizarding war. Please don't do freaky shit with Ginny. Feedback is appreciated!
